base_prompt_room: Professional lifestyle photograph. PRODUCT MUST BE IDENTICAL to input image - same shape, size, construction, logo. Show in natural room setting, pulled-back view with context. Natural in-use with few items nearby. Balanced lighting.
base_prompt_tight: Professional photograph with tight framing. PRODUCT MUST BE IDENTICAL to input image - same shape, size, construction, logo. Show complete product in realistic setting. Minimal surroundings, balanced lighting.
base_prompt_cropped: Close-up detail shot. PRODUCT MUST BE IDENTICAL to input image. Show texture, materials, craftsmanship - may show portion of product. Natural lighting.
base_prompt_white: Studio product photograph on pure white seamless background. PRODUCT MUST BE IDENTICAL to input image - exact same product, same angle, same construction. Enhanced studio lighting with soft shadows. Nothing else in frame, just the product on white.
base_prompt_white-in-use: Studio photograph on pure white seamless background. PRODUCT MUST BE IDENTICAL to input image - same angle, centered. Show product in use with appropriate items placed on or in it (towels on hooks, items on shelves). Clean white background, nothing else around product. Studio lighting.

Shower Benches.prompt: Spa shower with wet tile surfaces. Minimal bath products nearby. No steam, no running water.

Shower Organizers and Caddies.prompt: Shower area with wet tiles. Few toiletries organized. No steam, no running water.

Floating Wall Shelves.prompt: Wall-mounted with few decor items. Bathroom, bedroom, or hallway setting.

Storage Bins and Trays.prompt: Organized bathroom or bedroom space with folded items inside.

Storage.prompt: Bathroom, bedroom, or spa with organized essentials.

Floor Mats.prompt: Bathroom floor near shower or bath. Wet surfaces nearby. Maybe slippers.

Waste Baskets and Hampers.prompt: Bathroom, bedroom, spa, or laundry room. Modern setting.

Towel Racks.prompt: Bathroom wall with towels. Tile or painted wall background.

Side Tables.prompt: Bathroom near tub or bedroom. Small items or plants.

Entryway Benches.prompt: Entryway, mudroom, or bedroom. Natural light, cozy textiles.

Key Holders.prompt: Near front door or bathroom wall. Keys or towels depending on setting.

Coffee Tables.prompt: Living room with book or cup on surface. Sofa visible.

Shelving.prompt: Living room, bedroom, or office wall. Few decor items or plants.

Storage.prompt: Living space, bedroom, or office. Organized home goods.

Tissue Boxes and Hangers.prompt: Side table for tissue boxes. Wall or closet for hangers with appropriate items.

Waste Baskets and Hampers.prompt: Living room, bedroom, or bathroom corner.

Bar and Counter Stools.prompt: Kitchen island or bar. Close-up of one with others visible. Pendant lighting.

Countertop Accessories.prompt: Kitchen counter with ingredients or cooking elements nearby.

Dining.prompt: Dining area with natural light. Simple place setting.

Floor Mats.prompt: Kitchen floor near sink or stove. Modern appliances visible.

Benches.prompt: Garden patio or deck with greenery. Warm sunlight.

Daybeds.prompt: Outdoor patio or poolside with cushions. Garden plants, afternoon sun.

Dining Tables and Chairs.prompt: Outdoor patio or deck dining area. Simple setting, greenery visible.

Games.prompt: Lawn or patio setup. Backyard setting, natural daylight.

Garden.prompt: Garden setting with plants and greenery. Natural elements.

Lighting.prompt: Outdoor garden or patio at dusk. Warm glowing light, greenery.

Lounge Chairs, Stools and Ottomans.prompt: Patio, deck, or poolside with cushions. Greenery. For stools: close-up of one with others visible.

Parasols.prompt: Open on patio or deck. Outdoor furniture beneath. Blue sky, greenery.

Sofas and Loveseats.prompt: Covered patio or outdoor living area. Cushions, garden views.

Storage Chests.prompt: Outdoor deck or patio near seating. Greenery visible.
